dashboard.label: NPU Drop Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-time monitoring of NPU drop counters across network devices. Note: NPU counters clear on each run, so all values represent actual drops since last collection cycle.

search.query: index=main earliest=-24h@h latest=now | search analyzer_type="npu" OR npu OR NPU | stats count as event_count

panel.title: Active NPU Drop Sources - Last Hour

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="npu" earliest=-1h@h latest=now | eval drop_count=coalesce(drop_count, 'details.current_value') | eval asic_id=coalesce(asic_id, 'details.asic_id') | eval counter_type=coalesce(counter_type, 'details.counter_type') | eval counter_name=coalesce(counter_name, 'details.counter_name') | eval drop_count=if(drop_count=1, 0, drop_count) | where drop_count > 0 | stats dc(eval(device_name."|".asic_id."|".counter_type."|".counter_name)) as active_sources

panel.title: Top NPU Drop Counters - Last 24 Hours

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="npu" earliest=-24h@h latest=now | eval drop_count=coalesce(drop_count, 'details.current_value') | eval asic_id=coalesce(asic_id, 'details.asic_id') | eval counter_type=coalesce(counter_type, 'details.counter_type') | eval counter_name=coalesce(counter_name, 'details.counter_name') | eval drop_count=if(drop_count=1, 0, drop_count) | where drop_count > 0 | stats sum(drop_count) as total_drops, count as events, latest(_time) as last_seen by device_name, asic_id, counter_type, counter_name | sort -total_drops | head 20 | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

index=main analyzer_type="npu" earliest=-2h@h latest=now | eval drop_count=coalesce(drop_count, 'details.current_value') | eval asic_id=coalesce(asic_id, 'details.asic_id') | eval counter_type=coalesce(counter_type, 'details.counter_type') | eval counter_name=coalesce(counter_name, 'details.counter_name') | eval drop_count=if(drop_count=1, 0, drop_count) | where drop_count > 0 | sort -_time | head 50 | eval event_time=strftime(_time, "%H:%M:%S") | table event_time, device_name, asic_id, counter_type, counter_name, drop_count

panel.title: NPU Drop Rate Trend - Last 2 Hours

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="npu" earliest=-2h@h latest=now | eval drop_count=coalesce(drop_count, 'details.current_value') | where drop_count > 0 | bin _time span=2m | stats sum(drop_count) as drops by _time | timechart span=2m sum(drops) as "Drop Rate"
